item.title: ‘I did not vote for this’: Thousands of public comments slam Trump’s ballroom
item.description: A Post analysis of submitted comments found more than 97 percent were critical of the planned 90,000-square-foot addition. The White House has defende...

item.title: Senate Republicans sell housing plan and affordability, not war in Iran
item.description: GOP leaders have tried to focus debate on cost-of-living issues at the top of voters’ minds, as war rages throughout Middle East.

item.title: Trump allies expand role in planning America’s 250th anniversary
item.description: Two groups — one with the imprimatur of Congress, the other with President Trump’s blessing — are jockeying to host celebrations for America’s 250th a...

item.title: Led by top Trump aide, federal commission set to weigh White House ballroom project
item.description: The review, and possible vote, by the National Capital Planning Commission on Thursday is the final procedural hurdle for President Donald Trump’s pla...

item.title: Republican Sen. Steve Daines won’t run for reelection in Montana
item.description: Another Republican received President Donald Trump’s endorsement shortly after Daines’s announcement.
